all_review_reasons: The handwritten note 'reported pin that was badly over the' is incomplete and lacks context, making it ambiguous as to the exact location and nature of the pain.
The term 'Lateral Moresctomy' is not a standard medical term. It may be a misspelling of 'Mastectomy' or another procedure. The correct procedure name needs verification.
The handwritten text '7ear' in the 'Last time patient had teeth cleaned' field is ambiguous and likely a miswriting of 'year'. This requires human review to confirm the intended value.
The handwritten text 'Cldwell Dentist group' appears to be a miswriting of 'Caldwell Dental Group'. This requires human review to confirm the correct name of the dentist.
The date 'April 2023' is ambiguous and may be a misinterpretation of 'April 2026' from alternative readings. The handwriting is unclear and could be interpreted as '2026' instead of '2023'.
The extracted date '12/23/2026' appears to be a normalization error. The original handwritten value is '12/23/2025'. This discrepancy requires human review to confirm the correct year.
The handwritten 'UN' under the oral anatomy diagram is ambiguous. It could mean 'Unremarkable' or 'No findings', but without context, the exact meaning is unclear.
The handwritten 'UN DFV' is ambiguous. 'DFV' is not a standard medical abbreviation, and its meaning must be determined from context.
